---
title: "The gtree Package"
short-title: "gtree"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Extensive-form games and Gambit integration with the gtree package."
keywords: ["gtree", "extensive form", "Gambit", "R package"]
---

# The gtree Package {#sec-gtree-package}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
